name: Titan Speakerman 3.0
description:
I must say...that everytime you guys do persona me as TSM 3.0 I appreciate it you guys persona are better..but remember..we don't have official upgrades,APPERANCE and abilities and more etc about TSM 3.0 would be..we must wait for Dafuqboom to reveal the whole body of TSM now.

The good news is now that I will shout out the guy who gave me tips in my first OC!!!

Let's not waste time and get revenge arc for the astro...

Well you might hate me..but your OC must be Astro Toilets..why? It is because it's too unfair if some players tried to say he's ally but remember...ACT AS A ASTRO TOILET BECAUSE ITS TOO UNFAIR IF YOU HAD TITAN OC PERSONA OR OTHER MORE IT CANT BE FAIR WITH THE ASTRO...BECAUSE TSM 3.0 ON MY PERSONA MIGHT BE INVULNERABLE...

If TCM came out of Episode 80 or TSM 3.0 I would be shocked...This time Let's don't waste time and washed your guys brains...

🔴 TITAN SPEAKERMAN 3.0 — "VIRLANCE HYBRID" (Astro technology but the rest of the upgrades will hint you where did he is created...does dafuqboom? Dom studios? or Virlance or just my OC -_-.)

---

⚙️ APPEARANCE

(Combines Simple,refined,Aura farming!?)

Primary Color: Deep crimson metallic armor with white-gold resonance lines glowing rhythmically.

Secondary Tone: Polished graphite black plating.

Aura:

Red Crimson energy, symbolizing The Speaker Armada.

Surrounds him in smooth wave-like light distortions — like air vibrating in harmony.

Height: 100 meters!? — taller, stronger silhouette.

Speaker Head:

Based on Dafuqboom’s Titan Speakerman, but sleeker and more angular.

Speaker cones glow faint viridian when charging.

Center “mouth grille” added by Dom Studio’s armor realism style.

Chestplate:

Transparent sound-reactive glass revealing the Virlance Resonance Core (VRC) — the purified energy source.

Core pulses with synchronized white and green beats.

Shoulder Speakers:

Circular high-power resonance units with multi-layer disks (Dom Studio’s engineering detail).

Emit V-Resonance Waves — controlled pure sonic frequency beams.

Arms:

Sleek red plating, white glow lines up to his wrist.

Forearm Resonance Cannons fold out like twin emitters, able to merge into a massive “Ultra Sonic Blaster.”

Legs:

Heavier design (Dom Studio realism).

Stabilizers emit mini resonance waves when he walks — giving a rumbling hum across the battlefield.
creator: Titan Speakerman 3.0 (TSM 3.0)
